name: MolTrust
description: W3C DID identity verification, trust scoring, sybil detection, and lifecycle hooks (install / tool-call / inbound / gateway-start) for OpenClaw agents via MolTrust.

apiKey.description: MolTrust API key — get one at api.moltrust.ch/auth/signup

minTrustScore.description: Block calls/messages below this score (0-100). 0 = no-op (opt-in).

agentDid.description: Your agent DID. Required for self-verification + own-score gating.

verifyOnStart.description: Verify own agent DID on gateway start.

sensitivePrefixes.description: Tool name prefixes treated as sensitive — gated by trust score.

gateAllTools.description: If true, gate ALL tool calls regardless of prefix.

installAllowlist.description: Plugin/skill packageNames allowed to install. Empty = no allowlist gate.

cacheTtlMs.description: TTL for client-side cache of verify/score lookups (ms). 0 disables cache.

gateAllTools.label: Gate ALL tools (not just sensitive prefixes)
